title: crataegus oxyacantha var. media
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. media, also known as the mid-way hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus oxyacantha plant, which is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its flowers, leaves, and fruits, which are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. media include reducing high blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Crataegus oxyacantha var. media can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used to support cardiovascular health and well-being.
